name: Farrah Fawcett's Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all filling ingredients together.
2. Add the pecans to the mixture.
3. Pour the filling into the prepared pie shell.
4. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes.
5. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake for an additional 30-35 minutes, or until the outer edges are set and the center is slightly soft.
